baseline.notes: Run 33 regressed to F1 0.369 (TP 69 / FN 87 / FP 149) vs Run 32's 0.396. YOLO gate removed 40 events but 13 were TPs — only 67% precision on gate decisions. Root causes: (1) ±1s sampling around timestamp_start missed the fleeting landmark moment; (2) only best-confidence detection was evaluated. Run 34 applies Option A: full-event-span sampling + any-frame rule match.

targets.notes: Recover ≥8 of the 13 TPs lost in Run 33 while keeping most of the 27 FPs dropped. Beating Run 32 (F1 0.396) counts as a breakthrough.

notes: Run #34 — Option A fix for Run #33 regression. _sample_event_span samples n_frames=5 evenly across [timestamp_start, timestamp_end] instead of ±1s around start. Per-type rules now iterate over every ball detection and keep event if ANY frame satisfies the landmark rule (previously: only the best-confidence detection). Backlog B (relax goal_kick vertical band) and C (soccer-ball-tuned detector) deferred.
